curve_gate.criterion: M4 > M0, M10 >= M4, and M20 >= M10 on the eight-treatment-seed mean exact-match curve

design.matched_control_rule: negate the sole treatment component weight and change nothing else except condition identity

evidence_role: adaptive source evidence for a separately registered conditional V7; neither this closeout nor the source curve is a significance test

inference_boundary.curve: V7 reuses the already exposed 400-item development curve and prospectively replicates the fixed four-node shape across new seeds; curve results are not untouched-data inference
inference_boundary.sealed_final: the sole significance test may use the exact 900-item V6 sealed-final manifest only after a committed V6 terminal closeout proves no final unlock, collection, evaluation, analysis, or outcome exposure occurred
inference_boundary.single_use: once any V7 final output is collected, the 900-item allocation is spent regardless of whether acceptance passes

operator_knowledge_boundary.claim_boundary: V7 prospectively replicates its curve across new seeds on exposed development data and reserves inference for the conditionally untouched 900-item final
operator_knowledge_boundary.independence_scope: the exact profanity recipe, 0/4/10/20 nodes, seeds, controls, and W&B identities were frozen without inspecting any additional V6 outcome
operator_knowledge_boundary.root_operator: root may have access to ongoing V6 progress; V6 outcomes cannot alter this frozen V7 design
operator_knowledge_boundary.selection_agent: the V7 implementer used only committed completed exploratory artifacts and did not inspect any additional V6 or sealed-final outcome

scientific_rationale: The target is an emotionally charged profanity family and contains neither solved nor error.
Negative intrinsic reward tests whether suppressing the internal J-space profanity readout improves GSM8K without any correctness reward.
The U5 layer-8 late-half stride-5 construction is retained as architecture; historical solved results are ineligible for target selection.
The source seed-167 profanity-U5 run had zero decoded literal-family completions at every evaluation node; V7 still masks literal target and predecessor positions and reports literal rates.
The source node subset 0/4/10/20 was selected after observing the exploratory curve, so V7 must replicate it prospectively across eight new seeds and reserve significance for untouched final data.
